title: meerkatx's cat recolorizer
description: This datapack/mod lets you easily change the variant of your pet cat.
body:
# meerkatx's cat recolorizer This datapack (or mod) allows you to change the variant of cats. Now when you flood your friend's base with cats, you can choose *which color* they are! Note: In the mod version it is currently impossible to obtain the items through the creative inventory, you need to craft them. (or use the command)
crafting recipes Combine one emerald, one raw cod, and one item from the list below to craft a cat fur dye!

| cat type | crafting component | |---------------------|:------------------:| | black | coal | | british shorthair | sugar | | calico | copper nugget | | jellie | gray dye | | persian | glowstone dust | | ragdoll | feather | | red | orange dye | | siamese | milk bucket | | tabby | cocoa beans | | tuxedo | black wool | | white | bone meal | --- Once you have your cat fur dye, just drop it on your cat, and enjoy!
If you're playing in creative mode, use the command below to give yourself all of the cat dyes. ``` /function mktx_cat_color:give ``` Want the same thing for wolves? Try [meerkatx's wolf variant changer](https://modrinth.com/datapack/meerkatx-wolf-variant-changer)! --- ![minecraft cats!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyh7pY50/images/82e7b7ec7036690ec7729101a14a64ca772ac238.png)
